Mobile quick route

Quick route

Use this page only if it matches the town, county, or audience you need; otherwise start with the main directory.

All listingsVisitor channelsTemplatesSubmit update
Home/Task Guides/Huerfano Nonprofits

Huerfano County Nonprofits

Huerfano County nonprofit resources

Use this page for Walsenburg, La Veta, Cuchara, Gardner, Farisita, Red Wing. It combines public source shortcuts with the local resource directory, then asks users to verify before spending money, printing materials, booking talent, promising placement, or publishing claims.

County color + landmark

Francisco Fort Museum and the Spanish Peaks corridor

Use the landmark as a visual cue for county-specific campaigns, ads, event pages, and visitor-facing outreach.

Promotion angle

Connect the ask to place: county, community, audience, timing, and why it belongs here.

Prepare before outreach

mission sentence, county served, public benefit, partner ask, funding deadline.

Spreadsheet source

The downloadable workbook is included for audience-grouped review and Mailchimp/import planning.

Download workbook

Searchable shortcuts

Start with public routes that already collect this information.

Try keywords like funding, calendar, artist, nonprofit, Raton, Trinidad, Walsenburg, chamber, or grants.

RegionalArts / civic grants

Arts in Society Grant

Colorado artists, arts organizations, schools, governments, and cross-sector projects using art to address civic or social challenges.

Use for Las Animas and Huerfano arts/community projects that have a clear public benefit and partnership frame.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

HuerfanoCommunity calendar

Bachman Community Calendar

Farmers markets and recurring local event timing across La Veta, Cuchara, Gardner, and Walsenburg.

Use to avoid calendar conflicts and find offline outreach opportunities.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalStartup / innovation grants

Colorado Advanced Industries Accelerator Programs

Colorado startups, researchers, and technology companies commercializing products in advanced industries.

Use when a growth business needs research, commercialization, export, or early-stage capital support; pair with SBDC help before applying.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalBusiness funding directory

Colorado Business Funding and Incentives

Colorado businesses comparing tax credits, grants, loans, rural incentives, and job-creation programs.

Use as the Colorado starting page before drilling into Rural Jump-Start, enterprise zone, or industry-specific programs.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalCreative district / main street funding

Colorado Community Revitalization Grant

Creative districts, historic districts, main streets, and neighborhood commercial-center projects needing gap funding.

Use for venue, corridor, downtown, arts-district, or adaptive-reuse ideas in Colorado communities; verify open cycles first.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalArts organization grants

Colorado Creates Grant

Colorado nonprofit arts organizations and public arts programs seeking annual competitive support for arts programs, services, and activities.

Use for Las Animas and Huerfano arts nonprofits, galleries with nonprofit partners, and community arts programming.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalCreative economy support

Colorado Creative Industries

Colorado arts, creative industries, promotion, resources, and funding opportunities.

Use for artists, galleries, makers, and creative nonprofits in Las Animas and Huerfano.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalNonprofit directory

Colorado Nonprofit Association Directory

Colorado nonprofit member lookup and peer organization discovery.

Use carefully: the directory states non-commercial use limits.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalRural business development

Colorado OEDIT Rural Opportunity Office

Rural Colorado business, community, and economic-development programs.

Use for Las Animas and Huerfano projects that need statewide rural-development context.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalStartup incentive / rural grant

Colorado Rural Jump-Start Program

New or relocating businesses considering eligible rural Colorado zones, including tax benefits and possible matching grants.

Use for Huerfano or Las Animas startup/relocation questions, then verify zone eligibility and job-creation requirements with OEDIT.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

Local entries

Local entries and useful starting points.

Use the source link when available. If details have changed, send a correction.

Try keywords like funding, calendar, artist, nonprofit, Raton, Trinidad, Walsenburg, chamber, or grants.

Colorado Small Business Development Center - Pueblo

Huerfano, CO - Funding - Small-business advising, workshops and access to capital assistance.

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Open page

Huerfano County Economic Development

Huerfano, CO - Resource - Site readiness, downtown revitalisation, business recruitment and local economic development.

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Open page

Huerfano County Economic Development Inc.

Huerfano, CO - Media - Economic development

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Open page

Huerfano County Fair Board

Huerfano, CO - Media - Events / community

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Open page

Southern Colorado Economic Development District (SCEDD)

Huerfano, CO - Funding - Grant and loan funding assistance, CEDS preparation, economic development planning and technical support.

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Verify source

Spanish Peaks Business Alliance

Huerfano, CO - Media - Business network

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Open page

Spanish Peaks Chamber of Commerce

Huerfano, CO - Media - Chamber

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Open page

Spanish Peaks Country Tourism

Huerfano, CO - Media - Tourism / destination marketing

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Find the right route.

Search by need, county, town, audience, or task. Results include practical links and update reminders.

Colfax NM + Las Animas CO + Huerfano CO

This guide helps businesses, artists, nonprofits, programs, venues, and service providers find the right regional route faster.

See something outdated? Send a source link through Submit Update so the guide can improve.
